title: aulomyrcia rufipes var. bracteata
intro: Aulomyrcia rufipes var. bracteata, also known as a variety of the Red-stemmed Myrtle, is a plant species native to South America. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aulomyrcia rufipes var. bracteata include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
